title: Self-Drive Car Rentals
description: Travel at your own pace with our reliable self-drive car rentals. Perfect for families or groups who want privacy and the freedom to stop whenever they see a scenic viewpoint.
All vehicles undergo strict servicing, deep cleaning, and tire/brake safety checks before handover. Enjoy transparent pricing with zero hidden surcharges.

items.title: SUVs (Thar, Scorpio, Brezza):
items.text: High ground clearance and rugged suspension built for mountain gravel.

items.title: Unlimited Kilometers:
items.text: Drive without limitations or worrying about per-kilometer costs.

items.title: Simple Booking:
items.text: Present a valid LMV driving license and Government ID at pick-up.

title: Adventure Motorcycles
description: For the solo rider and adventure seeker, renting a motorcycle is the ultimate way to explore the winding turns of the Himalayas.
Pick up your bike along with a sanitized helmet from our hub in Rishikesh. Every bike undergoes a 12-point pre-rental safety inspection.

items.title: Royal Enfield Himalayan 450:
items.text: Built for gravel, rock crawls, and altitude.

items.title: Royal Enfield Classic 350:
items.text: The classic choice for comfortable mountain cruising.

items.title: Hero XPulse 200:
items.text: Lightweight, extremely agile on steep dirt curves.

extraContent: Safety Guidelines: Always wear a helmet, Keep left on blind mountain curves, avoid riding after sunset, and check engine oil levels daily.

title: Premium Chauffeur-Driven Cars
description: Mountain driving is highly demanding. Rest your hands and enjoy the valley views by booking a premium SUV driven by a professional local chauffeur who knows the terrain.
Our drivers are local residents who have spent years navigating Uttarakhand. They understand engine braking on downhills, slow curve navigation, and local weather signals.

items.title: Stress-Free Transit:
items.text: Avoid steep climb navigation or single-lane parking hassles.

items.title: Local Chauffeurs:
items.text: Our drivers double as guides, pointing out safe eating halts and scenic spots.

items.title: Ideal Use Cases:
items.text: Family pilgrimages, group tours, or winter routes.
